target: Verify Unit 4 'Colors Everywhere' (Stage 1) - 4 lessons covering colors (red, blue, pink, green, yellow, black, orange) and phonics P-T
summary: Backend API: 13/13 tests PASSED. Frontend UI: All critical flows verified. Unit 4 content is correctly seeded and renders properly in both backend APIs and frontend UI.

BACKEND_lesson3_vocabulary_5_words.evidence: API returns words array with 5 items matching expected

critical_code_review_comments: Unit 4 content correctly seeded from /app/backend/content/stage1_unit04.json via seed_content_v4.py
All 7 colors (red, blue, pink, green, yellow, black, orange) are included across the 4 lessons
Phonics P-T integration verified: pig/queen (P/Q), rabbit/run (R), sun (S), tiger/ten (T)
YouTube embed works correctly by converting watch?v= to embed/ format (UnifiedLessonPage.js line 243)
Hint display works in warmup activity (amber text under question)
Grammar game modes match JSON spec: L1=word_order, L2=fill_blank, L3=error_hunter, L4=word_order

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI flows verified via Playwright screenshots

seed_data_creation: Unit 4 content was seeded from /app/backend/content/stage1_unit04.json - no new seed data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unit 4 'Colors Everywhere' (Stage 1) fully verified. 4 lessons with 10 steps each are working. Content includes: L1=red/blue/pink/pig/queen, L2=green/yellow/rabbit/run, L3=black/orange/sun/tiger/ten, L4=review with 12 words. Grammar game modes: L1=word_order, L2=fill_blank, L3=error_hunter, L4=word_order. YouTube embed works in warmup. All APIs return correct data.
